\tzpentry{ID3468}{Density Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3468 introduces Density Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \rho\partial_t^2 \Phi_a + \gamma_a \partial_t \Phi_a - \rho c_s^2 \nabla^2 \Phi_a = S(\mathbf{x},t) - \lambda_a \, |\Psi|^2, \]
